additional_patterns.name: character_development
evidence: "the characters had so much depth and all were highly interesting as people"
"the film dealt with life - real life - the way it is for many women"

summary: The user shows a preference for drama and romance but often finds narratives lacking depth and coherence. They appreciate visual spectacle but are less concerned with production quality and emotional engagement, indicating a taste for light entertainment over complex storytelling.
